The goal of the pavilion design was to be calm and peaceful.

assumption is that the structure would bring peace to all visitors who enter.

Time flies when having fun during a quiet walk through the garden.

Time flies when having joy during a quiet walk through the garden.

The atmosphere inside remains serene for everyone who seeks a moment of rest.

No loud noises disturb the silence that fills every corner of this special place.

People often find themselves relaxing more than they expected in such a setting.
